faq.headline: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subheadline: Everything you need to know about our agency advertising accounts.
faq.q1: What is an agency ad account?
faq.a1: An agency ad account is a verified advertising account with higher trust scores and spending limits, designed for agencies and scaling brands.
faq.a2: Yes, all accounts are pre-verified with real history and high trust scores before delivery.
faq.a3: Most accounts are delivered instantly after payment. Rare manual verification cases may take up to 2 hours.
faq.a4: We support Meta (Facebook/Instagram), Google Ads, TikTok Ads, Snapchat Ads, and Microsoft Bing Ads.
faq.a5: Yes, every account comes with a balance warranty. If an account gets restricted, we replace it within 48 hours.
faq.a6: Yes, all accounts include full dashboard access to manage orders, balances, and deposits.
faq.a7: We accept bank transfers, Wise, Payoneer, cryptocurrency, and major credit cards.
faq.q8: Can I add my own payment method?
faq.a8: Yes, you can add and manage your own payment methods through our secure dashboard.
